A statistical toolkit for count regression analysis. Provides functions
to summarize count data, fit Poisson, Quasi-Poisson, Negative Binomial,
and Zero-Inflated regression models, assess model conditions, produce
diagnostic plots, and interpret model output in clear terms.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`check_conditions()`](check_conditions.md) : Check Conditions for
  Count Regression
- [`evaluate_model()`](evaluate_model.md) : Evaluate a Count Regression
  Model
- [`fit_count()`](fit_count.md) : Fit a Count Regression Model
- [`interpret()`](interpret.md) : Interpret a count regression model
- [`summarize_count_data()`](summarize_count_data.md) : Summarize Count
  Data
